mnemonics.title: IVOL - Transaction Components
mnemonics.content:
**I**nputs (UTXOs being spent + unlocking script)
**V**ersion (protocol version)
**O**utputs (new UTXOs + locking script + amount)
**L**ocktime (earliest inclusion time)

mnemonics.title: UTXO: Unspent = Unbroken Coins
mnemonics.content: Think of UTXOs as paper bills. You can't tear a $20 bill in half. To pay $15, you give the $20 (input) and get $5 change (output back to you).

mnemonics.title: Fee = In - Out
mnemonics.content:
Total Inputs - Total Outputs = Miner Fee
Always ensure outputs + fee = inputs
Forgot an output? The difference ALL goes to the miner!

mnemonics.title: LOCK and KEY Scripts
mnemonics.content:
scriptPubKey = **LOCK** on the output (conditions to spend)
scriptSig = **KEY** in the input (proof you can spend)
Key must fit the Lock for transaction to be valid
